title: selloa eriocarpa
intro: Selloa eriocarpa, also known as Indian warrior or Apache plume, is a flowering plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is rich in flavonoids and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Selloa eriocarpa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it easily accessible for herbal remedies and supplements.
